cards.front: Insert operation in a linked list
cards.back: Adding a new node at the beginning, end, or at a specific position in the linked list.

cards.front: Delete operation in a linked list
cards.back: Removing a node from the linked list by its value, position, or the head node.

cards.front: Display operation in a linked list
cards.back: Printing or showing all the elements in the linked list, either in forward or reverse order.

cards.front: Insert operation type in a linked list
cards.back: There are three types of insert operations: insert at the beginning, insert at the end, and insert at a specific position.

cards.front: Delete operation type in a linked list
cards.back: There are three types of delete operations: delete by value, delete by position, and delete by head.
